content.query:
SELECT
prd.[Division]
,prd.[ProductName] as ProductID
,prd.LongDescription as ProductDescription
,prd.Active
,prd.Division + '-' + prd.LP_ProductGroupID
,prg.ProductGroup
,count(lds.LeadID) as LeadCount
,cast(dbo.fnConvertUtcToEST(getdate()) as Date) as AsOfDate
 FROM 
 [EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT] prd
 left join [EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT_GROUP] prg
 on prd.Division + '-' + prd.LP_ProductGroupID = prg.ProductGroupID
 left join EDW.FACT_LEAD lds
 on prd.ProductID = lds.ProductID
 group BY
 prd.[Division]
,prd.[ProductName]
,prd.LongDescription
,prd.Active
,prd.Division + '-' + prd.LP_ProductGroupID
,prg.ProductGroup
 order by
 prd.Division,
 LeadCount desc
